title: World and resident mouse selection remediation
summary: Make residents, structures, lanterns and relevant map objects selectable with visible feedback and inspector updates while fixing pointer-event layering.
acceptance: Clicking visible residents and map objects updates selectedEntityId and player inspector state
Selection feedback is visible in Pixi and reflected in HUD without UI-owned world mutation
Clicking empty map tiles gives localized inspect/feedback state rather than silent failure
Overlay pointer-events do not block map selection except over real UI controls
E2E or renderer tests cover selection in both windowed and fullscreen-equivalent viewport sizes
forbiddenPaths: public release or platform verdict changes
